name: Apollo
highlight_text: Category: B2B Sales Intelligence & Engagement Platform
description:
What Apollo Does

Apollo is an all-in-one sales intelligence, data, and engagement platform with a large B2B database and outbound automation features. It emphasizes workflows for revenue teams, including prospecting, outreach sequences, calling, and performance analytics. Apollo is a broad, well-established platform that works especially well for mid-market and enterprise B2B teams.

Apollo is best suited for agencies that need to run high-volume outbound campaigns to mid-market and enterprise clients and want prospecting, sequencing, and basic calling capabilities built into a single platform.

Source: G2

Key Features

  • Large B2B database (contacts & companies)
  • Engagement sequences and outreach automation
  • Prospecting filters, scoring, and CRM sync
  • AI-powered call summaries, follow-ups, and deal insights

Benefits of Apollo

  • Quickly scale outbound sequences with a massive contact pool
  • Manage outreach and pipeline inside the same tool

Pricing

Apollo offers a free trial. 

  • Basic: $59/user/month
  • Professional: $99/user/month
  • Organization: $149/user/month (Min. 3 users)

Usage is governed by a credit-based model. Discounts are available on annual billing.

Pros

✅Huge contact coverage and integrated sequences

✅Affordable entry point

✅Consolidating prospecting, enrichment, and outreach into one tool reduces friction

✅Email sequences and task automation reduce manual work

Cons

🚫Large database but often skewed to enterprise data

🚫More expensive per user as features scale

🚫Credit-based model creates budget unpredictability

🚫Data accuracy varies significantly for SMBs

🚫Feature complexity overwhelming for simple needs

‍
what_people_say:
What Customers Say

“One of the best modern tools with a bunch of marketing features, it has replaced multiple tools for Data Mining, Email Marketing that we used to subscribe to, and will definitely be replacing one of the most costly CRM that we've been using for years. Our new team members were able to use it pretty quickly and have now started to use it daily.

We've observed around 75 to 80% data accuracy so far, which could have been better, also I would recommend Apollo to have its own email server.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
